attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386 Mono/.Net assembly, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert icmp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP Unusual PING detected"; icode:0; itype:8; fragbits:!M; content:!"ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWABCDEFGHI",depth 32; content:!"0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv",depth 32; content:!"EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE",depth 36; content:!"WANG2"; content:!"cacti-monitoring-system",depth 65; content:!"SolarWinds",depth 72; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop,ruleset community; reference:url,krebsonsecurity.com/2014/01/a-closer-look-at-the-target-malware-part-ii/; reference:url,krebsonsecurity.com/2014/01/a-first-look-at-the-target-intrusion-malware/; classtype:successful-recon-limited; sid:29456; rev:3; )
alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP PING Windows"; itype:8; content:"abcdefghijklmnop",depth 16; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:382; rev:11; )
alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP PING"; icode:0; itype:8; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:384; rev:8; )
alert icmp $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"PROTOCOL-ICMP Echo Reply"; icode:0; itype:0; metadata:ruleset community; classtype:misc-activity; sid:408; rev:8; )

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects requests to disable Microsoft Defender features using PowerShell commands

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Delete Volume Shadow Copies Via WMI With PowerShell
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities via PowerShell

values.Data:
[Available None 	NewEngineState=Available
	PreviousEngineState=None

	SequenceNumber=13

	HostName=ConsoleHost
	HostVersion=5.1.17134.858
	HostId=694c1e47-a7d9-4005-b491-469a428fac02
	HostApplication=powershell.exe & Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy | ForEach-Object { $_Delete(); }
	EngineVersion=5.1.17134.858
	RunspaceId=dd83c7d0-5aaa-44d3-84c8-01b7c9f33d29

	CommandLine=]

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the usage of binaries such as 'net', 'sc' or 'powershell' in order to stop, pause, disable or delete critical or important Windows services such as AV, Backup, etc. As seen being used in some ransomware scripts

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Michael Haag, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects PowerShell scripts attempting to disable scheduled scanning and other parts of Windows Defender ATP or set default actions to allow.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: frack113, elhoim, Tim Shelton (fps, alias support), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects commands that indicate a Raccine removal from an end system. Raccine is a free ransomware protection tool.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Detects initial PowerShell execution by SolarMarker
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects initial PowerShell execution by SolarMarker

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potential Suspicious Windows Feature Enabled - ProcCreation
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects usage of the built-in PowerShell cmdlet "Enable-WindowsOptionalFeature" used as a Deployment Image Servicing and Management tool.
Similar to DISM.exe, this cmdlet is used to enumerate, install, uninstall, configure, and update features and packages in Windows images
A General detection for files being created in the Windows startup directory. This could be an indicator of persistence.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Netsh Allow Group Policy on Microsoft Defender Firewall
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Adversaries may modify system firewalls in order to bypass controls limiting network usage

values.CommandLine: "netsh" advfirewall firewall set rule group=\"Network Discovery\" new enable=Yes
"netsh" advfirewall firewall set rule group="File and Printer Sharing" new enable=Yes

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects execution of netsh with the "advfirewall" and the "set" option in order to set new values for properties of a existing rule

values.CommandLine: "netsh" advfirewall firewall set rule group=\"Network Discovery\" new enable=Yes
"netsh" advfirewall firewall set rule group="File and Printer Sharing" new enable=Yes

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect the use of "sc.exe" to change the startup type of a service to "disabled" or "demand"

Detects usage of the built-in PowerShell cmdlet "Enable-WindowsOptionalFeature" used as a Deployment Image Servicing and Management tool.
Similar to DISM.exe, this cmdlet is used to enumerate, install, uninstall, configure, and update features and packages in Windows images
Detects non-interactive PowerShell activity by looking at the "powershell" process with a non-user GUI process such as "explorer.exe" as a parent.
Detects the usage of the "net.exe" command to start a service using the "start" flag
Detects the stopping of a Windows service via the "net" utility.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
